findings.detail: ATLAS C-283 heartbeat found at 2026-04-16T11:03:18Z. GI=0.9, source=kv, mode=green, seed successful.
ATLAS heartbeat GI=0.9 vs integrity-status GI=0.83. Discrepancy of 0.07 likely due to freshness penalty (0.6) applied in live computation but not reflected in cached heartbeat value.
Source is 'kv' (live KV-backed state), not mock. KV seed completed successfully for GI_STATE, HEARTBEAT, LAST_INGEST, SIGNAL_SNAPSHOT.
ECHO_STATE and ECHO_STATE_KV both false in heartbeat. This is a persistent issue dragging freshness to 0.6.
6 of 40 micro-agents unhealthy (no signal): ZEUS-µ3, AUREA-µ2, JADE-µ2, DAEDALUS-µ2, DAEDALUS-µ3, EVE-µ1. Persistent structural gaps.
Signal composite 0.675 is consistent with GI=0.83 given quality=0.8 and freshness=0.6 weights. GI is trustworthy.
ATLAS-µ1 WB GDP data stale (2024), HERMES-µ3 GDELT returning 0 articles, HERMES-µ4 Reddit returning 0 posts. API-level data gaps, not systemic.
No candidates pending verification. Verification skipped.

recommendation: Fix ECHO_STATE KV persistence to restore freshness score. Align GI reporting between heartbeat and integrity-status endpoints. Triage 6 silent micro-agents — fix or document as non-critical.
